name: Context-Aware Insurance Claim
process_description: The insurance claim process begins when a customer submits a claim through the portal, email, or phone channel. A claims agent checks whether all required documents are included and requests missing documents when needed. After the documents are complete, a claim assessor evaluates the case. Complex or high-risk claims may go through an additional fraud review before a supervisor reviews the recommendation and makes the final decision. The process ends when the customer is notified of the decision.
simulation_goal: Reduce claim decision cycle time while maintaining responsive service across claim types, channels, customer tiers, and priority levels
